alibaba_host_identity.detail: local DMI identifies Alibaba Cloud; raw DMI values are not recorded

application_not_public.detail: port 8080 is not bound on a wildcard address

application_secret_config.detail: Qwen key is present in a masked root-owned env file

bounded_runtime.detail: retry, timeout, completion, and rate limits are bounded

caddy_contract.detail: public Qwen health is denied and demo traffic is bounded/authenticated

caddy_secret_config.detail: domain and bcrypt Basic Auth values are present in a masked env file

deployment_target_binding.detail: approved target digest is bound to this pinned SSH session; raw target identifiers are not recorded

external_cloud_console_attestation.detail: approved masked receipt digest is supplied externally; this host check does not prove security-group, public-IP, coupon, or trial eligibility

https_proxy_active.detail: Caddy is active before application deployment

persistent_storage.detail: non-ephemeral filesystem has at least 1 GiB free

qwen_runtime_parity.detail: host uses the allowlisted international DashScope endpoint and candidate Qwen model IDs

required_paths.detail: release, state, config, and unit paths exist without symlinks

systemd_contract.detail: service binds loopback and only memory is writable
